name: Olive Profumate (Fennel & Orange-Scented Olives)
recipeIngredient: Zest of 1 orange, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the finely sliced garlic, orange zest in small pieces, and fennel seeds with the olives.
2. Allow the mixture to sit at room temperature for several hours, or cover and refrigerate for up to 2 weeks.
3. Serve the olives at room temperature by themselves or as part of an antipasto.
NOTE: Avoid using Kalamata olives because they are too salty and California Black Olives because they are too bland.
